allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d['data'][0], indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")
Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.data[0], null, 2\)\);}\)")
